basics.name: Jaani Francis Nickolas
basics.role: Technical Product Owner | Enterprise Aviation | Cloud-Native & Scalable Solutions

meta.title: Jaani Francis Nickolas | Technical Product Owner | Enterprise Aviation | Cloud-Native & Scalable Solutions
meta.description: Technical Product Owner with 10+ years of experience in enterprise aviation, delivering secure, scalable platforms through strong cloud and DevOps expertise. Specialised in building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) that improve developer experience, standardise infrastructure and security, and reduce delivery friction across teams. Proven ability to align platform strategy with engineering execution and drive measurable improvements in onboarding and operational efficiency.

summary: Technical Product Owner with 10+ years of experience in enterprise aviation, delivering secure, scalable platforms through strong cloud and DevOps expertise. Specialised in building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP) that improve developer experience, standardise infrastructure and security, and reduce delivery friction across teams. Proven ability to align platform strategy with engineering execution and drive measurable improvements in onboarding and operational efficiency.

experience.title: Technical Product Owner
highlights: Orchestrated the vision and roadmap for Jetstar's Internal Developer Platform (IDP) and Unified Infrastructure, reducing infrastructure onboarding time by ~40% and accelerating enterprise-wide platform adoption across engineering squads.

Pioneered a Two-Mode Operating Model for the cloud platform team: a structured Support track (Batman & Robin on-call model ensuring 24/7 platform reliability) and a Sprint track (quarterly goal-driven delivery aligned to organisational OKRs), eliminating the conflict between reactive operations and strategic delivery.
Led proof-of-concept (POC) for AWS cloud migration aligned with Qantas Group systems, evaluating feasibility, integration requirements, and technical readiness for enterprise-scale migration.
Maintained 100% PCI DSS compliance across existing infrastructure through year-on-year assessment cycles, coordinating audit readiness, evidence gathering, and continuous control improvements.

Drove cross-team alignment through Scrum of Scrums, 3 Amigos sessions, and domain alignment meetings, ensuring shared understanding across product, engineering, and architecture before work entered the sprint.
Delivered high-impact executive reporting with actionable KPIs and metrics, enabling data-driven strategy, continuous optimisation, and confident roadmap prioritisation.
Engineered the Platform Team Engagement Guide, transforming cross-team collaboration, streamlining onboarding processes, and scaling automation-first workflows.

experience.title: Cloud Engineer
highlights: Optimised AWS workloads across unified infrastructure, reducing infrastructure costs by ~20-30% through right-sizing and improved resource utilisation.
Transformed CI/CD pipelines from GoCD to GitHub Actions, cutting deployment time from hours to minutes and standardising reusable automation frameworks across 10+ teams.
Architected and managed Akamai CDN solutions including WAF rules and Bot Manager policies, strengthening application security posture and improving global edge performance.
Established advanced observability frameworks using CloudWatch, Splunk, and Datadog, enabling proactive incident detection and faster resolution across production systems.

Led cloud hardening initiative in response to CrowdStrike findings, systematically remediating all critical and high vulnerabilities across the AWS infrastructure to strengthen the overall security posture.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
highlights: Engineered Jetstar's microservices-based modular distribution platform from the ground up, supporting 100k+ daily e-commerce booking requests with high availability and API-driven architecture.

Developed and maintained scalable mobile backend services and DevOps pipelines using C#, REST/SOAP APIs, Jenkins, and AWS CloudFormation, driving reliable CI/CD delivery and improved release frequency.
Partnered with operations to implement proactive monitoring and alerting, significantly reducing unplanned downtime and enhancing overall service reliability.

experience.title: Application Developer
highlights: Delivered enterprise .NET/Java applications, introduced Atomic Design for frontend consistency, built CI/CD pipelines for airline reservation systems, and contributed to iOS development.

education.degree: Master of Technology (M.Tech) in Information Technology
Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Science

recommendations.name: Engineering Stakeholder
recommendations.quote: Jaani consistently bridges business priorities and delivery execution. He brings calm structure to complex cross-team initiatives and drives outcomes without compromising quality.

recommendations.name: Delivery Partner
recommendations.quote: He creates clarity for engineers through strong roadmap planning and practical technical decisions, helping teams ship faster and more reliably.

highlights: Serverless backend for GitHub OAuth, resume parsing, slug publishing, and hosted portfolio delivery.
Infrastructure defined with Terraform for repeatable deployment and clean environment setup.
Designed for lightweight operations with API-first flows and production-ready routing.
Focused publishing flow that takes a resume from upload to live portfolio in a few steps.
Simple dashboard for sign-in, content upload, slug management, and publish confirmation.
Static frontend integrated with the backend API for a fast and low-maintenance experience.
Modular FastAPI backend with endpoints for time, weather, rates, and news
Country-aware geocoding fallbacks for improved accuracy
Local developer workflow with scripts
Lightweight location-aware dashboard
Automatic news refresh synced with weather
Optimized with client-side caching

Cloud & Platform: AWS (EC2, ECS, EKS, Lambda, Fargate, S3, RDS, DynamoDB, CloudFormation, CDK, IAM, KMS, Secrets Manager, WAF, VPC, Route 53, ALB/NLB, API Gateway, CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CloudWatch)
